children.label: a
children.text: An action may be taken against an administrative law judge appointed under by the agency in which the administrative law judge is employed only for good cause established and determined by the Merit Systems Protection Board on the record after opportunity for hearing before the Board.section 3105 of this title
a furlough of 30 days or less;

children.label: A
children.text: a suspension or removal under ;section 7532 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: a reduction-in-force action under ; orsection 3502 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: any action initiated under .section 1215 of this title
